Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11444 0 0}I'm so sorry I'm making you leave the movie partway through...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}I just... I couldn't focus on the movie because I kept worrying that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11471 0 0}I-I was afraid that I might see that guy from before who tried to, um...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, but please try not to get into any fights. I don't want you to get hurt.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11489 0 0}H-Hey! Please don't say things like that! It was really scary last time![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}First you help me, and now you try to scare me... I don't understand you sometimes...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like I made Chihiro upset.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11493 0 0}{f 5 13 9 15 109}Y-Yeah, I'll try... I mean, it's not like it was here that we ran into him before anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sorry I was so distracted today. It was rude of me, wasn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro seems to be feeling[n]a little better now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about her today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11465 0 0}Oh, right. My mom asked me to buy some things for her on my way back...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}I should take care of that before it gets too dark. Thank you for today, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I waved goodbye to Chihiro as she headed to[n]the strip mall, then I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
